active_corrections: Context is fine until 60% — don't end sessions at 29%
Always use analogies for technical concepts
Use AppleScript or CDP, not Playwright
White text on dark backgrounds: #FFFFFF, never gray
No revenue talk without post-OPT framing (F1 visa, May 2027)
Research before recommend — fetch vendor pages, don't infer
Both shipped output AND foundational quality count as progress
